name: SKYRC USB Link
description: Configure and update SkyRC / Toro TS-series brushless ESCs over the USB link.

install.exe_relative_path: SKYRC USB Link V2.10/SKYRC USB Link V2.10.exe

notes: Portable exe - unzip and run. Linked from the Toro TS120A ESC product page. The versioned filename (download URL and the inner folder) changes each release, so this URL will rot; the app's single-exe scan still resolves the launcher if the pinned path drifts.
